top_signals.title: Powell Will Vote With His Mind and Heart, Daco Says
top_signals.summary: Gregory Daco, EY-Parthenon chief economist, says he thinks former Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell will not be afraid to dissent as a member of the board of governors. Daco speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Bitmine capitalizes on Ethereum price drop, buys over 100,000 ETH as 5% supply goal nears
top_signals.summary: "We view the recent pullback of ETH to below $2,200 as an attractive opportunity," Bitmine Chairman Tom Lee said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Baltic Dry Index climbs to 3085 up 94 points
top_signals.summary: Today, Tuesday, May 26 2026, the Baltic Dry Index climbed 94 points, reaching 3085 points. Baltic Dry Index is compiled by the London-based Baltic Exchange and covers prices for transported cargo such as coal, grain and iron ore. The index is based on a daily survey of agents all over the world. Baltic Dry hit ...
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Strategic Marine Delivers More Supa Swath CTVs to Mainprize Offshore
top_signals.summary: Strategic Marine and Mainprize Offshore have signed a Protocol of Delivery and Acceptance (PODA) for the MO15 and MO16 crew transfer vessels (CTVs), extending a multi-vessel offshore renewables vessel program announced in 2024.The agreement follows the earlier delivery of the MO10…

top_signals.title: Microsoft: Domain Controller lookup may fail on Windows Server 2016
top_signals.summary: Microsoft has confirmed a new known issue affecting Windows Server 2016 systems that causes domain controller lookups to fail after installing the KB5087537 May 2026 security update. [...]

top_signals.title: CISA to allow researchers to report vulnerabilities to exploited bugs catalog
top_signals.summary: The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) announced the creation of a nomination form on Thursday that they said enables “researchers, vendors, and industry partners” to report bugs that need to be added to the Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
